title: Principal Plant Manager at TVS Motor International Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Principal Plant Manager at TVS Motor International Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Plant Manager with drive and ambition, TVS Motor International Enterprises in Kanpur is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About TVS Motor International Enterprises:
TVS Motor International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in ISO 9001

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Referral bonus program
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with TVS Motor International Enterprises!
